Toilet was terrible, opened the door was greeted by cockroaches :(((( They didn't really maintained the room well. But the location was really in the middle of the city, few steps away from the MRT which a bonus for me. Review_Text: Pros: The unit is spacious. The master bed with bathroom is spacious. Everything worked as they should. Cons: all three beds, the bedsheets had stains and when requested for the sheets to be replaced, the next morning they came in just to make the beds instead of replacing the sheets. Review_Text: I booked for a night in this place and it was just a fine experience. The girl receptionist at night wasn’t that welcoming as she seems too tired for that day. But the guy in the morning named “Naim”(I guess that’s his name) he’s helpful. The room is just okay. Not that spacious but the bed is comfortable. The AC and shower just works fine. No toiletries available and you even need to fetch water from the water dispenser outside your room. Worst case is you can hear the voice from the other room.
